title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 426.330 - Assignee shall exhibit condition of assets, when
text:
426.330.  Assignee shall exhibit condition of assets, when. — Every assignee, upon the reasonable request of any person entitled to any demand allowed, or of his agent, shall exhibit to such person or agent the condition of the assets of the assignment, and give him all reasonable information concerning the same.
(RSMo 1939 § 5771) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5661; 1919 § 657; 1909 § 930
